column1: ### Supplementary Table 14 — Exploratory brain cis-eQTL colocalization (coloc.abf) at mtDNA-CN instrument loci

GTEx v10 cis-eQTLs from 13 brain regions colocalized with ASD, ADHD, and the F3 neurodevelopmental factor at +/-500 kb windows around mtDNA-CN instrument SNPs nominally (p<=0.05) associated with each disorder. Positions liftOver'd GRCh38->GRCh37 (pyliftover) and matched by chromosome:position. coloc.abf single-causal-variant assumption; PP4 = posterior probability of a shared causal variant. EXPLORATORY/hypothesis-generating: windows selected on disorder association (no genome-wide rate), and a high eQTL-disorder PP4 does not establish mtDNA-CN mediation. Listed: MitoCarta3.0 genes with PP4 >= 0.5 (n=26 gene-tissue-disorder triplets). Total coloc tests: 24,194; strong (PP4>=0.75) overall: 258.
